name: Mountain High Herb Baked Eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Grease 4 one-cup ramekins with cooking spray or butter.
3. Divide the flaked ham evenly among the ramekins.
4. In a large bowl, whisk together eggs, Dijon mustard, sour cream, chopped chives, and chopped parsley until well combined.
5. Pour the egg mixture over the ham in each ramekin, making sure it is evenly distributed.
6. Sprinkle shredded sharp Cheddar cheese on top of each dish.
7. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes, or until the eggs are golden brown and set.
8. Remove from oven and let rest for a few minutes before serving.
9. Makes 4 servings.
- Source: Mountain High Bed & Breakfast Julian (CA)
- Posted: Robert Bass Corona, CA
